proposed_relations.description: Bx41 LTD converted to Bx41 SBS on Webster Avenue per the presentation

rationale: Observation base_record_id 'route_webster-ave-sbs' matches existing registry record. The observation already resolves to this canonical id; no different target record is indicated.
Observation base_record_id 'route_bx41-local-webster-2012' matches existing registry record. The observation already resolves to this canonical id.
Observation base_record_id 'route_bx55-limited-webster-2012' matches existing registry record. The observation already resolves to this canonical id.
Observation base_record_id 'route_bx15-ace' matches existing registry record. The observation already resolves to this canonical id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bx15 Local – Local stops: The Hub ↔ Fordham Plaza

rationale: Observation base_record_id 'route_125th-laguardia-sbs' matches existing registry record (M60 SBS – Manhattan to La Guardia Airport), which already includes this source and aliases covering this observation. The observation already resolves to this canonical id.

Observation refers to MTA New York City Transit (NYCT). The base_record_id entity_mta-nyct is the closest and only matching registry record — same entity_name ('New York City Transit' is the short form of 'MTA New York City Transit'), same entity_type 'agency', same acronym 'NYCT'. Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new per identity-packet rules.

Observation refers to Community Board 4 in the Bronx. The base_record_id entity_community-board-4-bronx-2013 already exists in the registry with identical payload (entity_name 'Community Board 4', entity_type 'community board', description 'Community Board 4 in the Bronx'). The source 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb4 is already listed in the record's source_ids. Manhattan CB4 records are different entities (different borough). Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new.

The observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_webster-ave-bronx, which matches on all identity fields: same street (Webster Avenue), same borough (Bronx), same limits (The Hub to Williamsbridge), same description (based on the existing Bx41 route), and the observation's source_id 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb4 is already listed in that record's source_ids. No different registry record is a closer match; corridor_webster-ave-bronx-2012 and corridor_webster-avenue-bronx-2012 lack specific limits, and corridor_webster-avenue-sbs has different limits (Harlem River to The Hub). The closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, so decision is new.
